_comment: Evolution-by-use — CORE HOOK #2, the identity of the game. Every creature tracks three activity counters: `mining` (+1 per harvest tick while working), `exploring` (+exploringPerTile per tile walked — kept below 1 so idle wandering alone doesn't out-race the activities the player directs), `sanctuary` (+1 per sanctuaryTickSeconds spent resting; doubled when resting near decor). When ANY counter reaches `threshold`, the creature evolves, and the branch it takes is whichever counter is HIGHEST at that moment. Each branch swaps the sprite to a next-stage placeholder form and applies stat multipliers. Add branches or tune thresholds here freely.

mining.name: Forgekin
mining.description: Hardened by honest labor. Works much faster.

exploring.name: Swiftkin
exploring.description: Shaped by wandering. Moves far faster.

sanctuary.name: Bloomkin
sanctuary.description: Grown serene. Resonance is stronger around it.
